name: education_clinical_trial_amendment_would_lumen_rig_utl
premise: A heat emergency forced early dismissal; buses cannot cover every route before peak temperature, and some IEP students require one-to-one aides. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. agents.name: Elliot Chen

agents.name: Sana Chandra

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so utility does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so rights does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
